title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2023

summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends,and start to rebounded in the afternoon. the main contract closed853.5 by 0.89%. some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
